01 — About

Analyst. Storyteller.
Creator.

I'm Xinhe (Tali) Zhang — a multidisciplinary professional based in New York City, currently pursuing my MS in Management of Technology at NYU. My background is an unusual blend: a visual communication foundation from Ohio State, a decade of cross-continental work in corporate operations, media production, and content strategy, and now an active pivot toward business analytics and data visualization.

I've spent years in environments where two worlds collide — where a video producer sits next to an operations analyst, where audience data drives creative decisions, and where a compelling story can shift how a company is seen. I thrive in exactly that overlap.

From auditing US$82M in purchase orders at Celestica to producing videos that earned 54 million World Cup views at CCTV, from building social media audiences organically across TikTok and RedNote to co-authoring a peer-reviewed paper on Airbnb pricing — I bring analytical rigor to every creative endeavor, and creative clarity to every data challenge.

04 — Research & Publication

Published Research

ICFTBA 2024 · International Conference on Financial Technology and Business Analysis

Research on Different Factors Affecting Airbnb Housing Prices

Gengyuan Zeng, Ningning Huo, Xinhe Zhang

Advances in Economics, Management and Political Sciences (AEMPS) · Print ISSN 2754-1169

Conducted exploratory data analysis and linear regression in Google Colab to identify key factors influencing Airbnb housing prices using a dataset of 74,111 listings. Built and validated a log-price regression model evaluated via R-squared and correlation analysis.

Celestica

Shanghai, China

Operations Analyst
